_meta.description: Live macro themes affecting currencies but not on the scheduled news calendar. Update as regime-changing events happen (geopolitics, commodities, central bank rhetoric shifts, tariff/trade announcements). Scanner reads this at brief generation time and displays it in the daily/weekly review.
_meta.howToUse: Each theme should include: (1) short title, (2) start date, (3) currency implications with brief reasoning, (4) a specific watchLevel that would invalidate the theme, (5) affectedPairs for scanner correlation. Retire themes by moving to _retired[] with an endDate.

themes.title: US-Iran escalation supporting oil >$74
themes.summary: US strikes on Iran + ceasefire breakdown keeping crude bid. WCS follows Brent, so CAD gets a real tailwind independent of Canadian data. JPY/CHF get safe-haven bid; USD mixed (haven vs deficit concerns).

implications.AUD: mixed — commodity currency but risk-off drag
